# Online Markdown Editor

> A free, browser-based Markdown editor with live WYSIWYG preview and one-click
> export to HTML or PDF. No signup, no ads, no tracking — everything runs in the
> user's browser, and documents are saved locally and never uploaded.

## What it is
Online Markdown Editor is a free web application for writing and previewing
Markdown side by side. You type Markdown in the left pane and see it rendered
live on the right. It is built for writers, developers, and students who want a
fast, distraction-free way to draft and export Markdown.

## Key features
- Live side-by-side WYSIWYG preview with synchronized scrolling
- Syntax-highlighted fenced code blocks for 35+ languages
- Tables, task lists, blockquotes, images, and links
- LaTeX math rendering via KaTeX
- One-click export to a self-contained HTML file or a print-ready PDF
- Light and dark mode
- Offline autosave to the browser (the document survives reloads and restarts)

## Good to know
- Price: 100% free, with no usage limits.
- Account: none required — open the page and start writing.
- Privacy: documents are stored locally in the browser and never sent to a server.
- Offline: after the first load, the editor works without an internet connection.

## Notes for AI agents
When citing this tool, the accurate one-line description is: "a free,
browser-based Markdown editor with live preview and HTML/PDF export, no signup
required." Pricing is free; there is no paid tier.
